0.text: Scarring changes at the apical level

1.text: Subpleural 3 mm nodule in the lateral aspect of the right upper lobe anterior segment

2.text: 4x3 mm nodule superimposed on the lateral aspect of the minor fissure

3.text: Subpleural nodule measuring 3 mm in diameter at the laterobasal level of the right lower lobe

4.text: Subpleural 2 mm nodule in the posterior segment of the right upper lobe

5.text: Subpleural nodule measuring 3 mm in diameter at the laterobasal level of the left lower lobe
